As a user
I want natural-language command discovery so I can start campaign tasks quickly in chat.
So chatbot routing mirrors UI capabilities.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Campaign commands file includes create/search/quick/edit groups.
- [ ] Every command includes at least one alias.
- [ ] Commands cover all major workflows including "add" actions.
- [ ] Command chips hide granular actions where appropriate.
- [ ] Fuzzy matching surfaces top actions reliably.
